qa_pairs.question: What does a red x-mark in a CCV row indicate?
qa_pairs.answer: A red x-mark indicates that contents are missing for that row in your CCV.

qa_pairs.question: How can I edit information when a red x-mark indicates missing content in my CCV?
qa_pairs.answer: To edit information when a red x-mark is present, click on the pencil icon next to that row. The CCV interface will specify which fields are missing or incorrectly filled.

qa_pairs.question: How do I preview my CCV submission?
qa_pairs.answer: To preview your CCV submission, click on the 'Preview' button.

qa_pairs.question: How do I begin the CCV submission process?
qa_pairs.answer: To begin the CCV submission process, click on the 'Submit' button.

qa_pairs.question: What should I do with the confirmation number I receive after submitting my CCV?
qa_pairs.answer: You must make note of the confirmation number assigned upon submission, as it is mandatory to enter this number on the CCDB to link your RAC application with your CCV submission.

qa_pairs.question: Which CCV confirmation numbers are accepted for linking with RAC applications?
qa_pairs.answer: Only confirmation numbers for CCVs submitted using the 'Alliance' template will be accepted. Confirmation numbers from other templates (e.g., NSERC, CIHR) are not accepted.

qa_pairs.question: What is the final step to confirm my CCV submission?
qa_pairs.answer: The final step is to agree to the consent terms and confirm your submission.

qa_pairs.question: What information is mandatory under the 'Personal Information' section of the Alliance CCV template?
qa_pairs.answer: The 'Personal Information' section of the Alliance CCV template requires identification and correspondence language, both of which are mandatory.

qa_pairs.question: Is 'Education' information mandatory for the Alliance CCV template?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, 'Education' information, specifically 'Degrees', is mandatory for the Alliance CCV template.

qa_pairs.question: What is included in the 'Recognitions' section of the Alliance CCV template, and is it mandatory?
qa_pairs.answer: The 'Recognitions' section includes a list of prizes and awards over the last five years and is optional.

qa_pairs.question: What information is mandatory under the 'Employment' section of the Alliance CCV template?
qa_pairs.answer: The 'Employment' section requires Academic Work Experience, Non-Academic Work Experience, Affiliations, Leaves of Absence, and Impact on Research, all of which are mandatory.

qa_pairs.question: Is 'Research Funding History' mandatory for the Alliance CCV template?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, 'Research Funding History', specifically research funding over the last five years, is mandatory.

qa_pairs.question: What is included in the 'Activities' section of the Alliance CCV template, and is it mandatory?
qa_pairs.answer: The 'Activities' section includes Supervisory Activities, Knowledge and Technology Translation, and International Collaboration Activities, and it is optional.

qa_pairs.question: What types of contributions are listed in the 'Contributions' section of the Alliance CCV template?
qa_pairs.answer: The 'Contributions' section includes Presentations, Publications, Artistic Contributions, and Intellectual Property.

qa_pairs.question: Why is it important to include contributions in the CCV even if the 'Contributions' section is marked as optional?
qa_pairs.answer: Even though the 'Contributions' section is marked as optional, the Alliance needs to report to its funders the contributions enabled by its computational resources.

qa_pairs.question: How can Principal Investigators (PIs) update their CCV at any time?
qa_pairs.answer: PIs can update their CCV at any time by going to 'My account → View Reporting' on the CCDB.

qa_pairs.question: Which Alliance account users are required to submit a CCV for account renewal?
qa_pairs.answer: Only users with Faculty and Adjunct Faculty roles are required to submit a CCV to renew their Alliance account.

qa_pairs.question: For which user roles is submitting a CCV optional when renewing an Alliance account?
qa_pairs.answer: Submitting a CCV to renew an account is optional for Emeritus Professors, Retired Faculty, and Librarians.

qa_pairs.question: Who should Emeritus Professors, Retired Faculty, or Librarians contact if they choose not to submit a CCV for Alliance account renewal?
qa_pairs.answer: If they do not wish to submit a CCV for account renewal, they should send an email to support@tech.alliancecancomputecanada.ca.

qa_pairs.question: How recently must a CCV have been submitted to be valid for Alliance account renewal?
qa_pairs.answer: To renew your Alliance account, your CCV must have been submitted within the last 300 days.

qa_pairs.question: Where can I find the Alliance account renewals application form?
qa_pairs.answer: You can find the Alliance account renewals application form by clicking on https://ccdb.computecanada.ca/account_renewal.

qa_pairs.question: What specific section should I look for in the account renewals application form to update my CCV?
qa_pairs.answer: Once in the account renewals application form, you should scroll down to the 'Canadian Common CV' section.

qa_pairs.question: What information do I need to enter in the 'Canadian Common CV' section of the account renewal form?
qa_pairs.answer: You need to enter the submission confirmation number obtained from completing your Alliance CCV. Remember, only confirmation numbers for the Alliance template are accepted.

qa_pairs.question: What happens after clicking the 'Update CCV' button in the account renewal form if the submission is successfully processed?
qa_pairs.answer: If the submission is successfully processed, your application will be saved, and you will see all the publications reported in your Alliance CCV.

qa_pairs.question: What should I do if I receive an error on CCDB when trying to renew my account, even though I'm sure my CCV submission was successful and the parameters are correct?
qa_pairs.answer: If you receive an error on CCDB despite being sure your CCV submission was successful and parameters are correct, please contact support@tech.alliancecancomputecanada.ca for assistance.

qa_pairs.question: Where can I find further questions and answers about the Alliance account renewal process?
qa_pairs.answer: For further questions about the renewals process, you can visit the Renewals FAQ page.

qa_pairs.question: Who needs an updated CCV when applying for Resource Allocation Competitions (RAC)?
qa_pairs.answer: An updated CCV is required for the Academic Principal Investigator (PI) and ALL the co-PIs of a RAC application.

qa_pairs.question: If an Academic PI updated their CCV in the spring for account renewal, is it mandatory to submit a new one for a fall RAC application?
qa_pairs.answer: No, if an Academic PI updated their CCV in the spring for account renewal, submitting a new CCV for a fall RAC application (e.g., if new information was added) is at the discretion of the PI.

qa_pairs.question: Where can I find more information about the Resource Allocation Competitions (RAC)?
qa_pairs.answer: You can find more information by visiting the Resource Allocation Competitions (RAC) page.
